calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-09-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sandy Alvarez, in court, in propria persona, Petititoner; Leduvina Orquiza and Ely Orquiza, in court, in propria persona, Petitioners; Tagalog Interpreter: Dennis Fernandez. Oath on File.

The court and the Petitioners discuss this matter. The court points the parties to the number of issues with their respective petitions and advises that the parties should consider hiring legal counsel to assist them. The Petitioners presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to their respective petitions. The court and the Petitioners continue to discuss their individual positions. Upon further consideration, the court advises that it will be taking both petitions off calendar. No opposition to the court's tentative ruling is presented.

The competing Petitions for Letters of Administration are taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Rice. Not Reported.
